description: CompositionBlack sleeveless vest made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has a round neckline, iconic three stipes on the sides in white fabric strips and embroidered brand name on the upper left chestFittingRegularWash careWash in water below 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoLook cool while working out in this black sleeveless vest from adidas. The iconic three stripes on the sides and the embroidered logo on the upper left chest increases the brand appeal, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with tracks and performance shoes for sporting activites. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in vestsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-16"
